failedAssertions.reason: Authenticated users are not redirected away from /login. The login page renders fully even with an active session. The middleware or login page component does not check for existing authentication to redirect away.
My page is a bare placeholder ('User profile coming soon...') with no logout button. No signOut/logout functionality is implemented anywhere in the user-facing UI.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Test user has no phone number in seed data. Auth system supports phone login but the seed script does not populate the phone field for the test user.

Seed data exists in database (6 products, 12 events) but UI pages (Goods, Football, Basketball, Concert) are all placeholders showing 'coming soon'. These catalog pages are in later milestones (goods-catalog, event-listings).
Orders exist in database (2 orders for test user) but My page is placeholder and /my/orders returns 404. Order record page is in later milestone (user-profile).

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: Web Browser section with isolation rules, testing patterns, and evidence collection instructions
